arts.ttl: Sunday's Bundesliga predictions including Wolfsburg vs. Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Wolfsburg vs. Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Borussia Dortmund Want Vengeance Against Wolfsburg
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have not recorded fewer than 22 points in the first 14 matches since the 2014/15 season and have slid down the table following three consecutive draws. Borussia Dortmund have lost seven games this season.

arts.ttl: Wolfsburg vs Borussia Dortmund preview: BVB look to end winless run
arts.sum: Wolfsburg will aim to get their push for European qualification back on track as they face a Borussia Dortmund side aiming to end their winless run at Volkswagen Arena on Sunday.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Tottenham push for Dortmund ace over expensive Eze
arts.sum: The 28-year-old, known for his technical ability and creativity, has traditionally been deployed as a central midfielder or attacking playmaker during his time with Dortmund and Bayer Leverkuse, while he has played on both wings before, and even as a false nine. EXCLUSIVE: Tottenham push for Dortmund ace over expensive Eze

arts.ttl: Preview: Wolfsburg vs. Borussia Dortmund - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Wolfsburg and Borussia Dortmund, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
